SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AdminAiApiSettingsServlet
Admin page for configuring the OpenAI-compatible LLM API.
AdminDashboardServlet
Admin home: overall recruitment summary + workload-rule settings.
AdminEmailSettingsServlet
Admin page for configuring SMTP settings used by email notifications.
AdminMODetailServlet
Admin read-only detail page for one module organiser.
AdminMonitoringServlet
Admin exception view: monitor status/data anomalies across the system.
AdminService
Shared admin analytics and workload-enforcement logic.
AdminService.AdminApplicationRow
Application row on an admin detail view.
AdminService.ApplicationAlert
Application data anomaly flagged for admin review.
AdminService.CapacityAlert
Job posting that has reached its selection capacity.
AdminService.DashboardSummary
Aggregate counts for the admin dashboard.
AdminService.InterviewNoticeAlert
Application in interview stage missing expected notice fields.
AdminService.LimitAlert
TA who is at or over the configured workload cap.
AdminService.MODetailReport
Full admin read-only report for one module organiser.
AdminService.MOJobDetailRow
One job row on an MO admin detail view.
AdminService.MonitoringReport
Aggregated alerts for the admin monitoring dashboard.
AdminService.TADetailReport
Full admin read-only report for one TA.
AdminService.UserDirectoryReport
Filtered user list with per-role activity metrics.
AdminService.UserListRow
One row in the admin user directory.
AdminService.WorkloadRow
TA workload summary for the admin workload page.
AdminSettings
Admin-managed recruitment rules.
AdminTADetailServlet
Admin read-only detail page for one TA.
AdminUsersServlet
Admin directory of platform users with cross-role summary metrics.
AdminWorkloadServlet
Admin: Check TA's overall workload - number of selected jobs per TA.
AiApiSettings
Admin-managed LLM (OpenAI-compatible) API settings.
AIMatchService
AI-powered matching service - rule-based, explainable results.
AIMatchService.ApplicantRecommendation
For MO: enrich applicants with match score, missing skills, and workload recommendation.
AIMatchService.MatchResult
Result of skill matching between applicant and job.
AIMatchService.WorkloadInfo
Workload info for a TA (number of selected jobs).
ApplicantDetailServlet
MO view of one applicant's profile, applications, and interview evaluations across jobs.
Application
Job application - TA applies for a job.
ApplicationEvent
Immutable-style timeline event for one application.
ApplicationStatusServlet
Lists the logged-in TA's applications with status summaries and timeline events.
ApplicationTimelineService
Helper for writing application audit timeline events consistently.
ApplyConfirmServlet
Shows job + current profile/CV summary before POSTing to ApplyJobServlet.
ApplyJobServlet
Submits a TA job application and records the initial timeline event.
AssignedModule
One module that an admin assigns to an MO for the current term.
AuthFilter
Ensures user is logged in and has correct role before accessing protected pages.
CloseJobServlet
Allows an MO to close or reopen one of their job postings.
CsrfFilter
Provides synchronizer-token CSRF protection for state-changing requests.
CsrfTokenManager
Issues and validates session-bound CSRF tokens.
CVUploadServlet
Uploads a TA CV (PDF/DOCX), stores the file, and optionally pre-fills profile fields via LLM.
DataStorage
Thread-safe JSON file persistence for users, jobs, applications, and related entities.
DeepSeekClient
OpenAI-compatible chat API client (POST /v1/chat/completions).
EmailNotificationService
Sends emails using SMTP settings from admin settings, system properties or environment variables.
EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings
Resolved SMTP and portal settings used to send mail.
EmailNotificationService.SendResult
Outcome of a single send attempt.
EmailOtpRecord
Persisted email OTP record (for verification codes).
EmailOtpService
Email OTP (one-time password) generation + verification.
EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult
Result of EmailOtpService.requestOtp(bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, bupt.ta.model.AdminSettings).
EmailOtpService.OtpVerifyResult
Result of EmailOtpService.verifyOtp(bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
ExportWorkloadServlet
Admin CSV export of TA workload derived from selected applications.
ForgotPasswordServlet
Password reset flow using email OTP when enabled in admin settings.
InterviewBookingService
Coordinates bookable interview slots for applicants and module organisers.
InterviewBookingService.ActionResult
Success or failure from a booking action with a user-facing message.
InterviewBookingService.SlotSummary
Interview slot with current bookings and remaining capacity.
InterviewCalendarSupport
Builds simple iCalendar payloads for interview appointments.
InterviewEvaluation
MO interview assessment for one application.
InterviewNoticeTimeSupport
Normalizes the MO interview notice time sent to shortlisted applicants.
InterviewScheduleSupport
Normalizes the MO posting form's estimated interview time.
InterviewSlot
A bookable interview slot for one job posting.
Job
Job posting - created by Module Organiser.
JobActivity
Whether a job is still "active" for MO day-to-day management (My Jobs).
JobSearchServlet
TA job search with optional filters and rule-based skill match scores.
JobSelectionCapacity
Shared helpers for enforcing selected-TA capacity on a posting.
JobTemplate
Reusable MO job template so common course fields do not need retyping.
JobWorkloadEstimator
Estimates expected hours per selected TA for a job from structured work arrangements (same basis as MO work-quota planning).
LlmApplicantSummaryService
Builds short MO-facing screening summaries for one application.
LlmMatchInsightService
Optional LLM-generated narrative on top of rule-based AIMatchService.MatchResult.
LlmProfileExtractionService
Calls the configured LLM to extract structured profile fields from CV plain text.
LoginServlet
Authenticates users and establishes a session; optionally issues a remember-me cookie.
LogoutServlet
Ends the current session and clears remember-me tokens for the user.
MoApplicantListControls
Sort and filter controls for MO applicant lists on the jobs management page.
MOApplicantSummaryServlet
MO-only endpoint: generate AI summary for one application on demand.
MOBatchApplicantServlet
Batch operations for MO: mark PENDING as INTERVIEW, or send in-app interview notice to INTERVIEW applicants.
MOInterviewCalendarServlet
MO view: aggregate interview-stage applications across own postings into a simple date-grouped calendar.
MOInterviewCalendarServlet.CalendarRow
 
MOInterviewEvaluationServlet
Saves or updates an MO interview evaluation for an applicant in INTERVIEW stage.
MOInterviewSlotsServlet
MO management of interview slots for one posting.
MOJobDetailServlet
MO view of a full job posting (same fields as TA-facing detail, without apply flow).
MoJobsRedirectParams
Query parameters for MO jobs redirects (e.g.
MOJobsServlet
MO dashboard listing jobs and applicants grouped by recruitment stage.
MOMatchInsightServlet
On-demand AI applicant insight for an MO reviewing a candidate, paired with /mo/applicant-detail.jsp.
MOPastJobsServlet
MO view for jobs that are closed or past application deadline (not shown on /mo/jobs).
MOUpdateWorkTaCountsServlet
MO updates structured work arrangements (and planned recruits) on an active posting; recomputes derived workload text.
NotificationReminderService
Summarizes unread site notifications and can send reminder emails in batch.
NotificationReminderService.ReminderPreview
Counts for the admin unread-reminder preview panel.
NotificationReminderService.ReminderResult
Outcome of a batch unread-reminder email run.
PasswordHasher
PBKDF2-based password hashing with a self-describing storage format.
PaymentSupport
Normalizes structured payment inputs on the MO posting form.
PostJobServlet
Creates or updates an MO job posting, including structured work arrangements.
RegisterServlet
TA self-registration with email OTP verification when enabled in admin settings.
RememberMeCookie
Persistent cookie for "remember me" login (path matches web app context).
RememberMeFilter
Restores HttpSession from persistent remember-me cookie when the browser session cookie is gone.
RememberMeRecord
Server-side record for persistent "remember me" login tokens.
ResumeTextExtractor
Extracts plain text from uploaded CV files for LLM processing.
SavedJobsServlet
Shows TA saved jobs ordered by AI match score.
SaveJobServlet
Toggle save/unsave for TA jobs.
SecurityHeadersFilter
Applies a baseline set of security response headers.
SelectApplicantServlet
MO pipeline actions: move to interview/waitlist, reject from pending or waitlist, select from waitlist.
SiteNotification
In-app notification (site message) for a user — persisted as JSON.
SseEmitter
Thin Server-Sent Events helper used by the streaming LLM endpoints.
StudentNotificationService
Creates in-app notifications for TA applicants when application state changes.
TADashboardServlet
TA home: summary counts and quick links (replaces bare redirect from login).
TAInterviewBookingServlet
TA view to book, change, or cancel a slot for one interview-stage application.
TAInterviewCalendarServlet
Downloads an interview appointment as an .ics calendar file for the logged-in TA.
TAJobDetailServlet
TA-facing full job detail; apply is submitted from this page.
TAMatchInsightServlet
On-demand AI match insight for a TA viewing a job.
TAMessagesServlet
TA in-app messages: paginated list, filters, detail view, read / unread toggles.
TAProfile
TA applicant profile - skills, availability, etc.
TAProfileServlet
TA profile view and update (skills, availability, contact details).
User
User entity - represents TA, MO (Module Organiser), or Admin.
ViewCVServlet
Streams an uploaded CV file for authorized TA, MO, or admin viewers.
WithdrawApplicationServlet
Lets a TA withdraw an application; may promote waitlisted candidates when auto-fill is enabled.
WorkArrangementItem
One row of work arrangement on an MO job posting.
WorkArrangementSupport
Builds derived Job text fields from structured work arrangements and recalculates planned recruits.
WorkQuotaPlanner
Builds a balanced workload recommendation from work-arrangement rows.
WorkQuotaPlanner.Recommendation
Summary of one recommendation run (API surface for JSP / callers).
WorkQuotaPlanner.TAQuota
One virtual workload share: running total hours and per-work-name counts.
